summary: Frontend-only verification of Login.jsx useEffect redirect and My Account Profile section (self-serve name/email). All flows PASS at 100%. Login works for both superadmin and a newly created admin, redirects to /admin, and the Profile section renders (profile-name, profile-email, save-profile) alongside Change Password and 2FA sections. Save Profile persists across reload for both superadmin (name change) and a regular admin (email change). Duplicate email correctly returns 400. Superadmin name reverted, TEST admin deleted.
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx useEffect redirect works correctly; if user is already in context, it redirects to /admin (verified live).
Account.jsx Profile section is present with correct data-testids and pre-fills from user context via useEffect. Behaves identically for superadmin and admin roles.

Minor UX note (not a bug): after email change, admin's JWT still references old email in sub-claim; login with new email works but the session token is issued pre-change. Not required by request but worth noting.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST admin test_qa_admin@wifetobe.co.uk during test; teardown confirmed 200.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 confirmed the user's reported symptom is fixed. My Account -> Profile section renders and saves for all admin roles. Login redirect refactor to useEffect did not break login. Note Cloudflare blocks direct urllib API calls with error 1010 (no UA) - use page.evaluate(fetch) or requests with UA header instead when hitting the preview URL from scripts.
rca of the issue: Prior symptom (My Account had no email field for a newly created admin) was already addressed by adding the Profile section with profile-name/profile-email/save-profile testids in Account.jsx. Confirmed rendered for both superadmin and regular admin roles.
